title: sambucus javanica f. formosana
intro: Sambucus javanica f. formosana, also known as the Formosan elder, is a plant species native to Taiwan and is a variant of the Sambucus javanica plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Formosan elder include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
